lines: Fair of face.
paragraphs.text: Fair of face.

lines: The customer is always right.
paragraphs.text: The customer is always right.

lines: Two's company, three's a crowd.
paragraphs.text: Two's company, three's a crowd.

lines: The best things in life are free.
paragraphs.text: The best things in life are free.

lines: You can't make a silk purse from a sow's ear.
paragraphs.text: You can't make a silk purse from a sow's ear.

lines: Everything comes to him who waits.
